remarks: In the heart of New Canaan, The Quartier presents 21 bespoke luxury residences that pairs classic architecture and natural materials with sustainable energy features. This thoughtfully-designed free-standing 3-bedroom, 2-full and 1-half bath Townhome offers almost 1,800 square feet with gorgeous views off the spacious living room with oversized windows and doors, and 7" white oak flooring. Chef's kitchen with Leicht cabinets, quartzite counters and state-of-the-art appliances. A private primary suite with spa-like bath and walk-in closet on the top level. This refined, boutique development includes a full suite of modern amenities. Residents enjoy two luxurious lobbies with a full-time concierge, exclusive access to a professional fitness studio, an entertainment lounge with catering kitchen, a state-of-the-art golf simulator, outdoor grilling station and firepit, and advanced building security. Located just steps from world-class dining, boutique shopping, and the NYC train line. The Quartier offers luxury, convenience, and connection-all in one. Timeless luxury reimagined for modern living.
